entity.summary: Radix-focused DeFi trading ecosystem whose official site continues to list the CaviarNine DEX alongside other active and historical product surfaces. HEI treats aggregator, liquidity-pool, and shape-liquidity rows as product surfaces under this parent entity.
entity.notes: Product-surface source rows are collapsed under the parent CaviarNine entity. The official site separately labels some historical products as decommissioned, but the parent organization and CaviarNine DEX remain represented as current offerings.

evidence.title: CaviarNine official website
evidence.notes: Official site describes the Radix DeFi ecosystem, lists the CaviarNine DEX, and distinguishes active surfaces from explicitly decommissioned products.

evidence.title: CaviarNine exchange profile
evidence.notes: Exchange directory reference used to corroborate the parent trading identity.
